title: ImpostOre
body:
![ImpostOre logo](https://imgur.com/o0v0tRJ.png)

ImpostOre
---
**ImpostOre** is a simple mod that makes ores have a small chance to come alive when broken and attack you. The living ores have a 2.5% chance to spawn from any ore, though this is configurable. They will drop their respective ore when killed, if they are killed with a pickaxe that is capable of mining the ore.


This mod should work with any and all mods that add ores, as long as they are in the proper ore tag.
